name: Millennium Whisper
short_description: Millennium Whisper is a next-gen dating-sim set in 1999 at the fictional Escafeld College with an AI trained by real actors portraying the cast! Who will you confess your feelings to at the end of the millennium?
detailed_description:
ATTENTION: Millennium Whisper's AI system runs locally, therefore your computer requires a GRAPHICS CARD with 6GB VRAM (video memory) MINIMUM to play the game. 

Running the game on CPU is possible with 16GB SYSTEM RAM, however, running the game on CPU is STRONGLY DISCOURAGED as it is INCREDIBLY SLOW. Check your hardware against the game’s minimum requirements before purchasing!

It’s 1999 and there is a rumour going around. If two people confess their feelings for one another at the turn of the millennium, they will be destined to be together in a thousand year fairytale romance! Who will choose you on New Year's eve?

Welcome to Escafeld College, your home for the year and the crossroads of 13 unforgettable personalities. Socializing, attending events and forming friendships will be essential as you navigate daily life and the shifting dynamics of campus.

Building your skills is going to be vital to maintaining your standing at the college and with the cast.

Define your relationships with a delicate balance that will allow you to grow closer to the people you like. While also keeping you in the good graces of everyone else you meet at Escafeld.

But beware! rumours spread like wild fire. They can be sweet, silly or sinister. Hell hath no fury like an Escafeld Student scorned.

Millennium Whisper is a one of a kind experience using ethical AI.

Unlike standard dry AI experiences trained on large sets of data from the internet, the cast in Millennium Whisper is created by utilizing AI exclusively trained by real actors, and runs entirely on your own hardware!

The possibilities are endless, and the narrative you play out will be entirely unique to you. Each of our (13) characters has their own unique personality and behaviours powered by their own separately trained model. In Millennium Whisper you can enjoy complex relationships and deep meaningful conversations, or enjoy a more light hearted experience, having fun with the characters the way you choose.

Play the game your way, and write your own story.


🎀- Intricately drawn pixel art cast:

Game takes place entirely in a pixel aesthetic with a pixel art cast, environments and UI!

🎀- Ground breaking AI Conversation System:

A new ethical approach to AI in video games. Converse with the cast like never before. With an AI trained by real actors portraying the cast!

🎀- Manage relationships:

What you say matters. With realistic conversations the cast feel the full range of emotions. You can upset them, make them jealous and more!

🎀- And battle through swirling rumours:

Be aware, rumours can spread through Escafeld College quickly! The cast can spread rumours about you, and they could be good or bad!

🎀- RPG Stat System:

Choose how you spend your free time, and build your stats. These will shape the experience you have at Escafeld College!

🎀- Completely Offline:

Unlike other AI games that require you to be online, Millennium Whisper is entirely offline!

🎀- 13 Character Cast:

Each with their own look, personality, interests, and more. They won’t make it easy for you, and you’ll quickly find yourself immersed in the challenge of trying to Rizz-Em-Up!
